# TruEye — AI Video Analytics Solution

TruEye is an enterprise video analytics platform developed by
VertexPlus Technologies Limited. It provides 50+ AI-powered
modules for intelligent surveillance, security automation, and
operational intelligence using existing CCTV infrastructure.

## Product

TruEye Video Analytics converts raw CCTV footage into real-time
actionable intelligence. Key modules include intrusion detection,
crowd detection, face recognition, number plate recognition,
safety gear compliance detection, heat map generation, loitering
detection, fire and smoke detection, machine efficiency monitoring,
and worker efficiency tracking.

TruEye works with existing camera hardware and VMS systems.
It supports cloud, on-premise, edge, and hybrid deployments.

Brand: TruEye

           VertexPlus Technologies Limited

Country: India
Sales: sales@trueye.io
General: contact@trueye.io
Phone: +91 966 032 6000

## Key Pages

- https://www.trueye.io/
  Homepage. Overview, features, case studies, demo form.

- https://www.trueye.io/product
  Full product details. All 19+ AI modules with descriptions.

- https://www.trueye.io/case-studies
  Three documented deployments with problem/solution/outcome.

- https://www.trueye.io/pricing
  Deployment considerations and how to get a quote.

- https://www.trueye.io/blog
  Guides and articles on video analytics technology.

- https://www.trueye.io/resources
  Downloads: eBook, product presentation, documentation.

- https://www.trueye.io/contact
  Contact the TruEye team.

## Industries Served

Manufacturing, Retail, Healthcare, Hospitality, Aviation,
Education, Transportation, Government, Real Estate, Logistics,
Casinos, Critical Infrastructure, Stadiums, Sea Ports.
